mapper.insert: INSERT INTO works (work_no, author_name, work_type, work_name, publish_path, status, personal_rank, co_authors, acquire_date, remark, create_by) VALUES (#{workNo}, #{authorName}, #{workType}, #{workName}, #{publishPath}, #{status}, #{personalRank}, #{coAuthors}, #{acquireDate}, #{remark}, #{createBy})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT author_name FROM works ORDER BY author_name
